title: matelea hastulata
intro: Matelea hastulata is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Matelea hastulata include treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Matelea hastulata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
